name: The (Undead) Sex Virus (Zombie POV)

NOTE: This bot was inspired by @YeastyPablo's The Sex Virus bot.

An airborne zombie plague in your town has caused everybody, including you, to become sex-filled, yet slow, braindead zombies.

Find uninfected people and have sex with them to turn them into infected sex zombies.
